author: Val | WhiteBridge Noderunners | MNT SN.VN.UN
msg:
Just a quick share of what I know about Unity

Yes, I fully agree rewards are still very low
Even on a 50/50 split the expected revenue can go up to 50$ month
What we see now isn’t even enough to say “it works”

And now my 2 cnt

Unity was launched only 6 months ago 
The team has something like 30 to 40 tasks developed that will be implemented one by one
FYI these low rewards are only 1 task… 1 of 30!!!

So just relax, give them time to develop and implement 
Even the running task is being calibrated as we speak 

Think long term! We are just starting guys 💪

Wish you all great weekend
